# Swift Institute

> Layered Swift infrastructure for correctness, composability, and AI-assisted development.

## Documentation

### Architecture
- [Five Layer Architecture](Five Layer Architecture.md): Defines primitives, standards, foundations, components, applications
- [Semantic Dependencies](Semantic Dependencies.md): Conceptual dependency ordering

### API Specification
- [Naming](../Implementation/Naming.md): Nest.Name pattern, namespace structure [API-NAME-*]
- [Errors](../Implementation/Errors.md): Typed throws, error handling [API-ERR-*]
- [Code Organization](../Implementation/Code Organization.md): One type per file [API-IMPL-*]
- [Concurrency](../Implementation/Concurrency.md): Async patterns [API-CONC-*]
- [Design](../Implementation/Design.md): Design validation [API-DESIGN-*]
- [Layering](../Implementation/Layering.md): Package layering [API-LAYER-*]

### Implementation Patterns
- [C Shims](../Implementation/C Shims.md): Platform C interop [PATTERN-001]
- [Multi-Library](../Implementation/Multi-Library.md): Fine-grained products [PATTERN-002]
- [Platform Compilation](../Implementation/Platform Compilation.md): Conditional compilation [PATTERN-004+]
- [Swift 6](../Implementation/Swift 6.md): Language features
- [Anti-Patterns](../Implementation/Anti-Patterns.md): Common mistakes

### Memory & Ownership
- [Memory](Memory.md): Index of memory patterns
- [Memory Ownership](Memory Ownership.md): Borrowing, consuming [MEM-OWN-*]
- [Memory Copyable](Memory Copyable.md): ~Copyable types [MEM-COPY-*]
- [Memory Safety](Memory Safety.md): Safety patterns [MEM-SAFE-*]
- [Copyable Remediation](Copyable Remediation.md): Bug workarounds [COPY-*]

### Process
- [Experiment](../Experiments/Experiment.md): Experiment methodology [EXP-*]
- [Research](../Research/Research.md): Research workflows [RES-*]
- [Ecosystem Process](Ecosystem Process.md): Ecosystem maintenance [ECO-*]
- [Contributor Guidelines](Contributor Guidelines.md): Contributing guide

### Reference
- [Package Inventory](Package Inventory.md): All packages catalog
- [Glossary](Glossary.md): Canonical terminology
- [FAQ](FAQ.md): Common questions
